<svg viewBox="0 0 200 200" width="100%" height="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <rect width="200" height="200" fill="#050510" />
      <!-- Structured landscape/sunburst pattern representing classical art composition -->
      <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="45" fill="none" stroke="hsl(23, 80%, 45%)" stroke-width="2" />
      <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="40" fill="#ffaa00" opacity="0.2" />
      
      <!-- Symmetrical sunburst lines -->
      <g stroke="#fff" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.4">
        <line x1="100" y1="20" x2="100" y2="180" />
        <line x1="20" y1="100" x2="180" y2="100" />
        <line x1="43" y1="43" x2="157" y2="157" />
        <line x1="43" y1="157" x2="157" y2="43" />
      </g>
      
      <!-- Clean, sweeping, deliberate strokes -->
      <path d="M20,150 Q100,100 180,150" fill="none" stroke="hsl(173, 80%, 45%)" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
      <path d="M10,170 Q100,120 190,170" fill="none" stroke="hsl(23, 80%, 45%)" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" />
      
      <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="10" fill="#fff" />
    </svg>
hint: Notice the structured sunburst pattern and clean brush paths.
explanation: A deliberate composition featuring classical radial balance and clean, sweeping strokes indicating human planning and intent.
fact: Human artists follow rules of composition, such as the Rule of Thirds or Golden Ratio, which are visible in their deliberate layouts.
